programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: MLB Games of the Year
programme.desc: Addison Barger hits a pinch-hit grand slam in the 6th inning to lead Toronto to a Game 1 win.

programme.title: MLB Games of the Year
programme.desc: Yamamoto tosses his second straight postseason complete game in the Dodgers' 5-1 win.

programme.title: MLB Games of the Year
programme.desc: Freddie Freeman hits a walk-off home run to cap the Dodgers' 18-inning Game 3 win.

programme.title: MLB Games of the Year
programme.desc: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. homers off Shohei Ohtani to lead the Blue Jays to a 6-2 win in Game 4.

programme.title: MLB Games of the Year
programme.desc: Trey Yesavage strikes out 12 to lead the Blue Jays to a 6-1 win in Game 5.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Raymond van Barneveld

programme.title: Best of the MODUS Super Series

programme.title: An Audience with Phil Taylor

programme.title: Tungsten Talk

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Vincent discusses Barney's influence on Dutch Darts, why he made the switch to the PDC and key career moments.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: The best from Series 11 test their accuracy on tiny doubles and trebles in the Champions Choice Challenge!

programme.title: Pranking Darts Players

programme.title: The Story of Rob Cross

programme.title: Modus Darts

programme.title: Mr & Mrs: International Pairs

programme.title: Break of Throw: PDC Stars

programme.title: The Story of Luke Humphries

programme.title: The Legends League Darts Swap Challenge
programme.desc: The Legends League Darts Swap Challenge - featuring Steve Beaton, Richie Burnett, Devon Petersen and more!

programme.title: Darts Icons - Russ Bray and George Noble

programme.title: Break of Throw: Taylor on Littler
programme.desc: Phil Taylor breaks down Littler's throw, revealing the secrets behind the young World Champion's technique.

programme.title: Oche to Oven: Richie Burnett and Steve Beaton
programme.desc: From the heat of competition to the heat of the kitchen, Beaton and Burnett cook up food and conversation.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina reconnects with an old flame Cory and finds herself juggling two guys. Spencer forces Heidi to kick her sister Holly out of the apartment.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren and Audrina travel to Cabo for Brody's birthday, but the party turns into a fight. Spencer humiliates Stephanie after learning that her new boyfriend is friends with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren tries to make peace between Brody and Stephanie. Audrina wants to make things work with Corey but Justin won't give up on her. Stephanie has doubts about her new boyfriend after he fails to stand up to Brody.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina gets her own place, hoping Justin will move in with her but everyone fears she is moving for the wrong reason. Heidi invites Spencer to a work event and gets caught having a little too much fun.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Whitney travels to New York expecting to reconnect with Alex, but a boy named Jay steals her away. Heidi is miserable after being fired, but when Spencer tries to get her old job back, he makes the situation much worse.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren lets Heidi's sister crash at her place. Justin asks Audrina to go away for a romantic weekend, and Heidi's frustration with Spencer grows after she has to beg for her job back.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina believes a rumor she hears: that Lauren hooked up with Justin. Meanwhile, Holly tries to get Heidi away from Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina tries to save her friendship with Lauren after accusing her of hooking up with Justin. Spencer and Stephanie visit their grandmother who is fed up with their fighting.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in her New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach, and Stephanie turns to Spencer for help with Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer and Heidi ignore the concerns of their families and run away to Mexico to elope. Whitney takes a chance at a dream job in New York City and says goodbye to Lauren and her life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with the fallout of their elopement and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Heidi crashes Laurens surprise birthday party, the two old friends cry about their disintegrated friendship. Spencer starts a violent fistfight when Cameron accuses him of picking up a bartender.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer's flirtatious ways lead Heidi home to Colorado, where she reconnects with an old boyfriend. Lauren gives Stephanie a piece of her mind for inviting Heidi to her birthday party. Spencer ends a long silence with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: After Heidi catches Spencer at a nightclub with Stacie the bartender, she demand's they go to couple's therapy. Lauren puts her reputation on the line when she gets Stephanie an internship at People's Revolution.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina tries to get over Justin by setting her sights on Brody. Heidi drags Spencer kicking and screaming to couples therapy. When Stephanie screws up at People's Revolution, Lauren threatens to fire her.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina tries to get over Justin by hooking up with Brody when the girls crash the boy's surf trip to Hawaii. Heidi's virgin ex-boyfriend comes to visit and she hopes some of his values will rub off on Spencer.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla is a southern belle with friends, horses, and a personal trainer. But now that she's pregnant, she has to start making her own tough decisions about marriage and her ability to make it without the help of her parents.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Frida y Brandon se reencuentran y Diana toma cartas en el asunto. Kim y Suavecito se besan apasionadamente pero Ian tiene un As bajo la manga. La llegada de un nuevo Ex y alguien es expulsado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra
programme.desc: La tablet manda a Ana e Isaac a una cita romántica y Leslie tambalea. La sala tornado abre sus puertas y sus vientos traen muchas dudas. Lizbeth y Diana planean una broma que no termina nada bien. La llegada del próximo ex podría ser devastadora.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento
programme.desc: La llegada de Michelle hace arder la villa. La sala tornado pone de cabeza los sentimientos de Leslie. Christian inicia la llama del amor con Andrea mientras que Diana provoca una explosión.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?
programme.desc: Lalo viene a terminar los pendientes con Leslie y a Isaac le toca atacarse. Lizbeth explota contra Isaac y Rufas. Yurgenis se libera en un catamarán, sin la sombra de Brandon. El nuevo ex llega muy salsa, pero de la que no pica.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El jaque mate
programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber places a costume on top of Trolley to participate in the upcoming parade. Prince Tuesday is collecting comforting messages for X the Owl and Henrietta Pussycat in hopes of drawing them out for the parade.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers puts together a small fountain and shows a video of fountains around the world. King Friday gives a fountain to Westwood. Mayor Maggie searches for water for the fountain and is squirted by Lady Elaine Fairchilde.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber wears a raincoat as Lady Elaine continues squirting water from her hose. He helps Corney install an umbrella over the factory. Mr. McFeely stops by with a videotape about how people make concrete sidewalks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Captain Arnold shows Mister Rogers various aspects of being a firefighter. Volunteer Firefighter Handyman Negri asks Lady Elaine for her garden hose. Smoke is seen coming from the Platypus mound. Lady Elaine puts out the fire.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred Rogers visits a school and sees what the students do during a fire drill. Everyone is working to repair the Platypus Mound, which was damaged by a fire. Lady Elaine Fairchilde receives an award from King Friday XIII.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use a computer mouse as he introduces viewers to the "online neighborhood." The King and Queen are searching for the "royal mouse."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches demonstrations of mechanical ball inventions. Prince Tuesday and Lady Aberlin are outside the castle playing with a unique toy. King Friday is unhappy about not finding Hula Mouse and breaks the toy.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches children dancers perform and musicians play. King Friday sincerely apologizes to Hula Mouse for his previous behavior. Lady Elaine presents an exhibit of round things. Mr. McFeely shows a film on how marbles are made.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about curiosity. He uses a frame to look closely at different parts of a large mural, and the vegetables in the piece remind him of his trip to "The Edible Schoolyard" in Berkeley, California, where children garden.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Negri's Music Shop where musicians are playing different homemade instruments. Mr. McFeely brings a video showing how people make ice cream cones.

programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: iCarly en español

programme.title: iCarly en español

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo viaja sin querer en una máquina del tiempo. / Bob Esponja y Arenita pelean karate en todos los lugares y Bob debe evitar pelear en el Crustaceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The terrible history of Sanji's family continue to unfold. From a rare moment of compassion, he is able to escape, only to face his father's cruelty before setting out on his own.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in an all-out, all-you-can-eat battle! As Cracker's endless stream of Biscuit Warriors marches on, Luffy's endless appetite is put to the test. Meanwhile, Reiju helps Sanji to straighten himself out before he meets his fiancée.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs to think fast in order to turn the battle in his favor - filled with biscuits, he debuts a new Gear Four attack that has lasting repercussions! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot find Sanji's reflection, but can they get a message to him in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finally catches up with Sanji! However, as a happy past plays before his eyes in which he, Sanji, and the crew deepened their bonds, a new page is turning in the history of the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's journey with the crew looks to be coming to an end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes a solemn promise to not move from his spot until Sanji returns to him. But as Mama's army advances, that promise may prove a costly one. Meanwhile, Sanji and the Vinsmokes come face to face with Big Mom and his bride-to-be Pudding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands his ground and waits for his friend to return! But the vengeful army washes over him - only a true friend can step in to turn the tide of battle! Meanwhile, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage - and come to a startling conclusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts his all into battling Big Mom's vengeful army, however, their skills combined prove too formidable. Meanwhile, Sanji goes to Big Mom herself to bargain for the Straw Hats lives - with shocking results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot are captured by Brulee and strung up for dinner! But Chopper sees a chance to free himself! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro launch a plan to reach the Ponegliffs - a daring game of chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pekoms creates a diversion for Brook to set his plan into action. Meanwhile, Luffy continues to goad Big Mom into a fight, and Pudding begins to have stirrings of rebellion herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Just when Luffy and Nami are in Big Mom's grasp, Pudding arrives, but with news that they aren't expecting - meanwhile Brook and Chopper both make headway getting out of their own jams!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hopes his wedding with Pudding will solve the Straw Hat's predicament - but Pudding secretly plans to to avoid the marriage, sharing a secret with Luffy. Meanwhile, Brook comes face to face with Big Mom herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries desperately to free himself as the risk of his own well-being! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot continue to search the mirror universe, Brook squares off against Big Mom, and Pedro's past is revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to break himself free as Sanji falls deeper in love with the idea of marrying Pudding... But the mask falls off and the deadly charade of Big Mom is revealed as the depths of her treachery come to light!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook continues his all-out struggle against Big Mom, but his secret weapon might not be enough to save him! Meanwhile, an unexpected ally from the past comes to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei arrives on the scene and works to free Luffy and Nami! Meanwhile Sanji confronts his sister with the awful truth of Pudding, and she confides in him the powerful secret of their mother's undying love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook finds himself totally at the whim of Big Mom, and comes face to face with her brutal love! Meanwhile, Pedro reveals his explosive plan to create a distraction!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot use the mirror dimension to get in touch with Nami and Jimbei! Luffy makes it through more obstacles to learn that he just missed Sanji! Meanwhile, Sanji wonders alone about the best course of action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook hears Big Mom's plan firsthand as she shares her intentions with Pudding in front of him! Meanwhile, Big Mom's agents believe most of the Straw Hats to be under control, but doubt besets Montd'Or.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others finally find Brook in the mirror dimension - but he's in the most inopportune of places! Can they challenge the sleeping Mama and rescue their friend? Meanwhile, Luffy is waylaid on his way back to the rendezvous!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts up a valiant fight in order to keep his word to Sanji! But will he be able to last until Sanji arrives at the rendezvous? Meanwhile, Jimbei shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Luffy meet finally - and while he is happy to feed Luffy to replenish his energy, Sanji's explanation of what actions he must take baffles Luffy! The crucial decision, to turn his back on his friends or his family, tears Sanji apart!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The newly reunited Luffy and Sanji hear from the rest of the Straw Hats in the mirror dimension! Then, Jimbei starts telling them about Capone "Gang" Bege and proposes a shocking plan to take down Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats put Jimbei's plan into action and approach Bege with the possibility of an alliance. But before they are granted an audience, they must make themselves presentable!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The proposed alliance between the Straw Hats and Bege unfolds! A gaseous blast from the past, Gastino, a member of Bege's team, reveals the secret weapon that the team plans to use against the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now, the assassination plan of Big Mom is all set and everyone starts preparing for the Tea Party. Montd'Or finds one of his crewmates, Bobbin the Disposer, dead, and suspects Sanji and Luffy of the crime.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The day has arrived! Guests from the criminal underground pour in droves, but some have their own agendas to settle! Big Mom's sons, however, stand in their way and show them what they've got! Meanwhile, Luffy is preparing for his own plan!

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: An ingenuous young Frenchman is accused of murdering the husband of the woman he hopes to marry.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A brilliant young scientist is accused of his deceitful, greedy wife.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A retired fire chief is accused of arson and murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A young woman, trying to trap the fradulent fortuneteller she blames for her father's ruin, instead becomes implicated in a murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: An embittered housekeeper tells Perry Mason that her invalid employer is in danger of being murdered by her husband.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: An actress who is seeking her long-lost son becomes implicated in the murder of a drama critic.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: All Shook Up
programme.desc: Jimmie does his best to keep a piece of Elvis memorabilia from leaving the building.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Driving along the back roads of Tennessee in the early morning fog, Mike and Frank are brushing up on their Southern expressions when they spot an awesome property.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle is jealous when the guys take Mike's young nephew on his first pick instead of her. But 12-year-old Rhesa is thrilled, especially when the trio starts exploring Danny Bean's sprawling property.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: On their first-ever trip through Arizona, the guys tap into their spirit animals to track down a lifetime picker whose property is packed with killer stuff.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While in Michigan's Upper Peninsula, the guys stumble upon Woody the Woodcarver's 80-acre property which features a Finnish sauna, an art gallery outhouse, and a 100-year-old barn that's packed to the rafters.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are in Missouri, heading towards an inherited old farm with plenty of promise. But then Danielle calls with news about an ultimate prize.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Thousands of miles from home, the guys are scouring the back roads of Texas desperate to find the big-ticket item that will make the long trip worthwhile. Just like his late father, Aardean is a funeral director who never throws anything away.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys go hog wild at a sprawling ranch in Texas, where Mike flips for a VW bus that's been transformed into a hunting lodge on wheels.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Join the Pawn Stars as they are presented with an Abraham Lincoln campaign ribbon from the 1860 presidential race. Will this historic piece of presidential memorabilia win their vote or will a tough debate leave the shop divided?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with the opportunity to add one of the world's most recognizable trophies to their collection--a Grammy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with a necklace once owned by Elvis Presley.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Run for cover with the Pawn Stars when a World War I helmet blasts into the shop. The first metal helmet used by U.S. forces, will the guys butt heads to buy this piece?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars snap to attention as they check out a photo album signed by one of history's greatest military leaders--General George S. Patton.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars run for their lives when they come face-to-face with the fire-breathing, 31-ton mammoth Robosaurus.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Really Gotta Go Kart
programme.desc: The guys check out an old go-kart that, with the help of Yankee's restoration powers, has the potential to become something extraordinary.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Paintball Cajun Style
programme.desc: Two new items leave the guys star struck: A check signed by Judy Garland, and a 1932 World Series program for the game in which Babe Ruth famously "called" his home run.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Silver Dollar Spook-tacular
programme.desc: Jimmie challenges the staff to compete in a Halloween costume contest. Later, a customer brings in a 1967 Cadillac Fleetwood hearse.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Cash Cows
programme.desc: Johnnie and Robby steer toward a deal when they look to invest in a dairy farm, while another customer attempts to unload a rare 1800s French gun. Later, the guys try to green-light the purchase of a classic 1990 Ferrari 348.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Yankee Magic
programme.desc: Country singer Tracy Lawrence stops by the shop looking to sell his 1920s Martin guitar and a colorful 1960s suit from singer-songwriter Hank Snow.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Mail To The Chief
programme.desc: A customer brings in a one-of-a-kind letter written by President Bill Clinton during his college years.

programme.title: You Only Live Twice
programme.desc: Sean Connery stars as James Bond in this special-effects spectacular that takes him to Japan to foil an evil plot involving the onset of a nuclear war between the Russians and Americans.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Just as Agent 007 finally discovers true love, he is thrown into spectacular action and danger in this entertaining adventure that stars George Lazenby as the charismatic Bond.

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: Sean Connery stars as the dynamic 007, on the trail of a diamond smuggler who leads him on a nerve-shattering chase through Amsterdam, Los Angeles and eventually, glittery Las Vegas.

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: Roger Moore's debut as James Bond takes him in pursuit of a voodoo- worshipping underworld drug czar who leads him from Harlem to New Orleans to the exotic Caribbean. Jane Seymour also stars.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Gun
programme.desc: After his life is threatened, Roger Moore as 007 is lured into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with a million-dollar killer (Christopher Lee). Britt Ekland and Maud Adams co-star.

programme.title: The Spy Who Loved Me
programme.desc: Roger Moore as agent 007 teams with a beautiful Soviet agent (Barbara Bach) to battle Stromberg (Curt Jurgens) in order to save the world from total annihilation and a 315-pound villain, "Jaws" (Richard Kiel).

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: 007: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: 007: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: 007: GoldenEye (ESP)
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: 007: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: 007: El mundo no basta
programme.desc: Cuando el carismático agente 007 (Pierce Brosnan) es asignado para proteger a la bella heredera de un imperio petrolero, se ve envuelto en una apasionante aventura llena de adrenalina que lo enfrenta a uno de sus peores enemigos.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody, who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!"

programme.title: Top Gun

programme.desc: When Ranma wakes up from a dream in which he witnesses a dried-up Jusenkyo, he is determined to travel to China using the Magic Mirror.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: The day of the Martial Arts Rhythmic Gymnastic Challenge is finally here! The battle is about to begin as Akane and Kuno look on from the crowd.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu: Karamatsu and Brothers / New Employee Totoko / Mr. Dubbingmatsu
programme.desc: Karamatsu is flooded with requests for favors by his brothers, Totoko gets hired into Todomatsu's company, and the glory of a Mr. Osomatsu voice recording session is revealed.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu: Chibita's Revenge
programme.desc: For years the Matsuno boys have taken adavantage of Chibita, who has now reached a breaking point. On a dark and stormy night, the crazed oden chef begins hunting the sextuplets down one by identical one.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: A young boy named Eitarou begins idolizing Jyushimatsu, even going so far as to ask to be his apprentice. Later, Dayon steals Prof. Dekapan's pants, and it's all sandwiched between some Totoko vs. Nyaa action!

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu: End of the Year
programme.desc: Lots of shorts to end the year, and later Totty gets cut from the Matsuno team.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: A miracle of sorts for the anti-social Sanematsu, Iyami leads Hatabou and Jyushimatsu on a hunt for occult animals, and Choromatsu debuts his new, "cool" look to his brothers.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: A second UMA expedition, Ichimatsu can't open a jar, Karamatsu is a tax driver, and then the Annual New Year's Totty Quiz wraps everything up.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: Having grown weary of this universe, the Space Pirate Shazaar decides to make a change. Later, it turns out Matsuzo is somewhat of a gourmand, then a cute girl named Kinko Inuyama moves in next door to the Matsunos and miraculously befriends the boys.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: A third UMA expedition starts things off, then Ichimatsu becomes nervous when too many good things start happening to him and Jyushimatsu. Finally, Karahiko and Todomi take a trip up into the mountains and end up staying in a haunted Japanese inn.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: Hungry Town has all the old charm of post-WWII Japan. Though not wealthy, the neighborhood teems with energy and its inhabitants are busy with life except for Iyami, who refuses to work and spends his days in poverty until he meets a child named Kiku.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: Dekapan becomes President on a whim, Iyami sets up a new con with Chibita and Hatabou's help, and the brothers decide that this year, for once, they're gonna get Valentine's Day chocolates no matter what.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: Another round of miscellaneous absurdity.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: The boys stop in at a late night ramen shop, Tottimi wants to earn some quick cash (but not doing this!), and Matsuyo decides to send one of her precious, stupid NEETs to a correctional facility.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: Everyone hops on Hatabou's private jet for a trip to the Hawaii. But when something goes wrong with the plane along the way, the group finds themselves washed up on a deserted island.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: At last the secret life of Dayon is revealed, Iyami has started feeling like he just doesn't belong on the show, and the boys hit Himatsuya ramen twice!

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: When Matsuzou's health fails, the sextuplets have to start thinking seriously about their future, with each starting to fumble his way towards a new life.

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu: Mr. Osomatsu in Hell
programme.desc: Iyami sets off on a treasure hunt but ends up crashing his plane right into the Matsunos' house. The NEETs were all at home…but they're going to be all right, right? RIGHT?

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
programme.desc: The sextuplets attempt to find a job, and Osomatsu tries to find where all of his brothers went off to.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Soun Tendo, head of the Tendo Dojo, is happy that Ranma and his father have come to fulfill their promise of wedding Ranma to one of his daughters.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Akane and Ranma start at the same school, but at the gates all the male members of the school sports clubs are lying in wait to attack.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Tatewaki Kuno, captain of the school's Kendo club and infatuated with Akane Tendo, discovers that Ranma is Akane's fiancé.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Kuno has fallen in love with the "pigtailed girl." Unaware of her true identity, Kuno challenges Ranma in order to present him with a gift.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: After a big fight, Ranma is beaten up badly by Akane. She takes him to Dr. Tofu's clinic to be treated...

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: The great Dr. Tofu is tending to Ranma's wounds when Kasumi stops by. The second Dr. Tofu lays eyes on her, he is unable to contain himself.

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: A strange young man appears at Furinkan High School in search of Ranma. When he sees him, he exclaims "Ranma! Prepare to die!" and attacks!

programme.title: Ranma 1/2
programme.desc: Bent on destroying Ranma's happiness, Ryoga sends Ranma a letter challenging him. The two begin their battle on the grounds of Furinkan High School.

programme.title: Bleach: The DiamondDust Rebellion

programme.title: Bleach: Fade to Black

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: The Movie
programme.desc: A long time ago, a powerful spirit drove the world to the brink of destruction. Naruto's latest mission is to protect Shion, a priestess from the Land of Ogres, whom the spirit is after.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Bonds

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: The Lost Tower
programme.desc: The Rogue Ninja Mukade is about to be caught by Naruto, when he summons the power of an ancient underground channel of chakra. Naruto gets caught up in the chakra and is sent back in time.

programme.desc: A soldier's New Year's Eve turns into a nightmare when another soldier tries to kill him.

programme.title: I Survived . . .

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Unsealed Conspiracy Files
programme.desc: There is a secret government facility accused of creating many diseases currently plaguing our country. Have we unleashed these biological weapons on purpose and if so, is there a secret lab near you.

programme.desc: There is a battle going on for your mind. From the Cold War to the TV set, someone wants to control what you think, how you act and what you believe.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files

programme.title: Boogeymen

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Cubesats, miniature satellites that have been used exclusively in low Earth orbit for 15 years. Now, these tiny satellites are growing in mainstream popularity, and are being used for interplanetary missions as well. They have even been sent to Mars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 3

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 5

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 6

programme.desc: Un bebé aparentemente sano desarrolla repentinamente una deficiencia de oxígeno. Cuando la policía trae a un hombre desaliñado que dice ser el Ministro de un pequeño pueblo, el Dr. Kivela sospecha que hay más en la historia de lo que parece.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente parece estar alucinando y envía al personal de urgencias a una persecución inútil por el hospital; un médico recibe una descarga eléctrica que le detiene el corazón cuando toca a un paciente que está siendo desfibrilado.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos víctimas de accidentes automovilísticos, un hombre y una mujer, llegan por separado y casi desnudos, pero gradualmente se revela su historia de pasión e infidelidad; Se descubre que un niño que sufre de náuseas tiene un bloqueo cardíaco.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una madre y su hijo de 6 años son llevados rápidamente a la sala de emergencias del Dr. Kevin Veale después de un horrible accidente automovilístico. El cirujano ortopédico Dr. Douglas Lundy encuentra que su experiencia médica no es suficiente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente es mordido por una serpiente. El pecho de un paciente con VIH explota y un hombre de 600 libras debe entrar en la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Toda una fraternidad está plagada de orina azul; una mujer embarazada puede perder a su bebé por una picadura de araña; y un paciente en coma resulta ser un traficante de drogas que tragó heroína.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La mano de una recién casada se atasca en un electrodoméstico de la cocina y un estudiante universitario es atormentado por una lesión en el fondo; un bebedor empedernido está ahora sobrio y experimenta complicaciones que amenazan su vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un niño de seis años sufre un derrame cerebral potencialmente mortal; un hombre tiene una estufa de campamento pegada en su pene.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El cráneo de un hombre es atravesado con una palanca; la tos de una mujer resulta ser una infección por gusanos internos; una novia está cosida en su vestido de novia y se niega a quitárselo, aunque necesita tratamiento para un cálculo renal.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre piensa que está estreñido, pero su condición es potencialmente mortal; un médico que trata a una mujer con un paro cardíaco descubre que está tratando a dos pacientes en uno; y la familia del paciente no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una adolescente está sangrando internamente por un embarazo ectópico, pero niega haber tenido relaciones sexuales, por lo que su médico debe encontrar una manera inteligente de probar su embarazo antes de poder tratarla.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches the ocean for a mobile geothermal drilling station the ancients left dormant. Cautiously exploring the station, Teyla thinks she senses the presence of a Wraith. Weir, believing it's pressure affecting Teyla, has the team press on.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After helping relocate the Taranans, the Atlantis team realizes they haven't heard from the village in a long period of time. It appears the Taranans have just abandoned their village until McKay detects life signs well beneath the surface.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is shocked when a satellite housing a stargate takes up orbit above Atlantis. When the stargate begins transmitting an energy beam, attacking the city, McKay takes a page from the Ancients and opts to sink Atlantis back into the ocean.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Atlantis starts shutting down due to a damaged power system, Rodney McKay turns off all non-essential systems. But in just 28 hours, McKay realizes the city’s shields may fail completely and its inhabitants will succumb the vacuum of space.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Sheppard leads a daring raid to secure a ZPM that will save Atlantis. When the Replicators become aware of the incursion into their city, Sheppard’s team must keep them at bay or else abandon the mission and their hope of saving Atlantis.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Ronon reconnects with a group of Satedans from his past who enlist the Atlantis team's help on a dangerous mission against the Wraith. But after the Atlantis crew is captured, Ronon is faced with the truth about his old friends’ new loyalties.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an exploratory walk on a jungle planet, Sheppard touches a glowing crystalline growth and becomes host to an infectious energy form. Once on Atlantis, the entity begins to move from person to person, putting the entire crew at risk.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: On his way back to Atlantis, Lt. Col. Sheppard is taken prisoner by a rogue ship helmed by a ruthless human commander with a secret agenda. As the team searches for him, Sheppard's resourcefulness is put to the test as he tries to stay alive.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and Homeworld Command order Col. Young to execute a high-risk plan concocted by the IOA scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Using the communications stones, Lt. Scott and Camile Wray use their time back on Earth to visit those they’ve left behind. Aboard Destiny, the crew stumbles upon a piece of Ancient technology that carries the promise of a way home.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked when a member of the crew is found dead from a gunshot wound. While it appears to be suicide, the gun is nowhere to be found…until it shows up in Col. Young’s (Louis Ferreira) quarters and he becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate project is imperiled when a reporter threatens to expose the top-secret portal. O'Neill attempts to stop him while the rest of the team tries to save Jackson's wife who has been impregnated with a Goa'uld. Is this the end of Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny discovers that he has the ghostly power to "overshadow" and inhabit the bodies of others - which comes in handy when his dad, Jack, is called in for a conference.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny needs quick cash to buy clothes for his first homecoming party so he starts selling all his parents' ghost-infected, mechanized junk at a yard sale.

programme.desc: After some run-ins with Dash, the school bully, Danny uses his powers to get revenge and triggers the ghost of Poindexter, a kid who haunts his locker to this day.

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Jazz has noticed a change in Danny ever since "the accident in the lab." She mistakes his ghost hunting for depression and signs him up for therapy with Penelope Spectra. What Jazz doesn't know is that Spectra is a ghost who feeds off teen misery.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: When ghosts destroy a student's life and popularity in school, she dedicates her life to hunting ghosts. Now Danny has to deal with a threat only a few lockers down the hall. and worse? Danny's best friend, Tucker, has a crush on her.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny and Sam find their platonic friendship turned forcibly romantic through the musical powers of Ember, a hard rocking girl ghost who feeds off the idol worship of teens.

programme.title: JAG

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Capt. Shepard leads his troop off its peacekeeping mission and into battle with the colonel of the rebel forces. Consequently, six marines die in the public incident. Harm is sent in to investigate despite a recent touch of bad luck in a string of trials.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco le pide ayuda a Juan y a Óscar, su hermano mayor se niega hasta que Eva lo convence para que acepte. Jimena consigue trabajo, Fernando llega con Pepita a la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes asumen sus responsabilidades en la hacienda, pasan los meses y Norma da a luz a su bebé, Jimena tiene éxito en su trabajo aunque extraña a Óscar, él no aguanta los celos al verla.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta la decisión de su hermano porque es la oportunidad para acercarse a Norma, ella se preocupa cuando ve a Fernando con su bebé. Jimena le muestra a Ruth unas fotos de Libia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita se encuentra con el nuevo dueño de la hacienda Trueba, con quien tiene una fuerte discusión, ella cae del caballo y se desmaya, cuando despierta está en la habitación de Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita y Franco pelean de nuevo, esta vez delante de todos los invitados a la fiesta en honor a los Reyes. Juan muere de celos al ver a Fernando con Gabriela, teme que Norma haya vuelto con él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan conoce a su hijo y lo toma en sus brazos con ternura, Gabriela arma un escándalo hasta que Norma aclara que él tiene derechos porque es el padre, luego ella desacata la orden de su madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando acepta la propuesta de trabajo de Gabriela, Norma accede, aunque exige que no se inmiscuya en su vida, ella está dispuesta a enfrentar a su madre por Juan. Rosario pregunta por Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le da un regalo a su hijo cuando vuelve a encontrarse con Norma en los límites de la hacienda, ella no esconde sus sentimientos. Ruth desafía a su madre y comienza a trabajar con Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma descubre que su bebé no tiene la cadena que le regaló Juan y se enfrenta con Gabriela, mientras que Martín le aconseja que vuelva con el padre de su hijo. Armando se enfurece con Rosario.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As Racers soar high above the breathtaking Victoria Falls toward a double U-turn, Team Texas uses their express pass in the hopes of eliminating The Green Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers face a third U-turn for the first time in the show's history, and teams try to power through an exhausting, late night detour on their way to an Indian wedding.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Hong Kong and Macau, China where they take part in a spectacular water show at The House of Dancing Water and compete for a chance to race in the final leg.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.desc: Mark takes a job as a stable boy against his father's wishes.

programme.desc: Mark and Milly are held hostage in her general store when two gunmen attempt a daring robbery.

programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: For a number of familiar faces, a new, well-established community seems too good to be true.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The remaining members of the group try to keep it together in Alexandria; they receive a sobering visit.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society unlike anything seen before.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors; members of Alexandria look for supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues as other members scavenge for supplies; things quickly spin out of control.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others are led to a new community, where they meet the residents and their ruler; a familiar face resurfaces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While searching for a missing Alexandrian, Rick and his group encounter a mysterious collective, its inhabitants unlike any they have come across.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ahora que los caminantes han traspasado las barreras de Alexandría, Rick y los otros sobrevivientes deben seguir luchando para mantenerse a salvo e intentar no perder la esperanza.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se descubre contra quién ha ejecutado Negan su venganza. Después, lleva a Rick a hacer un viaje que este no olvidará jamás, con la intención de mostrarle hasta dónde llega su poder y cómo va a cambiar la vida de todos los protagonistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Morgan son conducidos hasta una comunidad que parece segura y bien abastecida. Todo resulta tan idílico, que la desconfianza ante lo que están presenciando aflora en ellos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan mantiene a Daryl encerrado en una celda, pero le propone que se someta a él y pasará a disfrutar de los privilegios de los que gozan los suyos. Se descubre el pasado de Dwight y por qué tiene la cara desfigurada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los miembros del grupo de Alexandria están desmoralizados debido a los trágicos acontecimientos que acaban de ocurrir, pero al mismo tiempo deben prepararse para el encuentro con Negan. Éste llega antes de lo previsto y les arrebata las armas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Afligidas por la pena y rodeadas de enemigos, Maggie y Sasha tratan de encontrar seguridad en Hilltop, pero allí no son bien recibidas por todos. En ese momento, los hombres de Negan llegan a Hilltop, adonde también se dirigen Carl y Enid.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tara llega a un poblado en el que sólo viven unas peligrosas mujeres que no la dejarán salir de ahí fácilmente. Mientras tanto, Heath, quien la acompañaba en la búsqueda de provisiones, se pierde tratando de escapar de un ataque zombi.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl se separa de Jesus y llega, oculto en un camión, a la guarida de los Saviors con la intención de matar a Negan. Mientras tanto, Rosita fuerza a Eugene a que le fabrique una bala y Michonne pone en marcha su propio plan contra Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan continúa su visita a Alexandría. Spencer trata de entablar amistad con él para que lo designe líder de la comunidad, en lugar de Rick. Pero en ese momento Rick llega y se desencadena una serie de acontecimientos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Guiados por Jesus, Rick y sus compañeros llegan hasta la comunidad del rey Ezekiel, para buscar aliados en su lucha contra Negan. Allá se reencuentran con un viejo conocido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras buscan a Gabriel, Rick y el grupo se topan con una misteriosa región cuyos habitantes son completamente diferentes a todo lo que han conocido hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, ahora en el cuartel general de los Salvadores, tiene que demostrar a Negan que vale la pena mantenerlo vivo. Mientras, Dwight es culpado de que Sherry haya permitido la fuga de Darryl y Negan le da una última oportunidad: encontrar a Sherry.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick busca provisiones y armas con las que contentar a sus nuevos aliados en la lucha contra Negan. Mientras, Rosita está cada vez más impaciente por comenzar la guerra y en Alexandria, Tara deberá tomar una decisión trascendental.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores acuden a un encuentro con habitantes del Reino para llevarse los suministros que les cobran a cambio de protección, pero algo sucede y las cosas no marchan tal y como deberían.
